title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION WOMEN'S FACILITY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of sweatpants, sweaters, jeans, T-shirts, thermals and underwear, socks, backpacks, batteries, hand warmers, juice, tents, tarps, sleeping bags, bed sheets, and pillowcases. Also accepts financial donations and $25 gift cards for guests. 1340 NE Logan Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-5pm Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-9766 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - 30 DAY SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
